creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
> I was wondering if there was a way to just copy the patched loader.efi from a
> flash disk to the install I already I made or whether the patched loader.efi
> file is now just the standard file available in FreeBSD 11- Current -

Yes, the fix is in both -CURRENT and stable/10.  Yes, you should be able to use loader.efi from one of those snapshots.
